primary_sources.name: CMS End-Stage Renal Disease Prospective Payment System
primary_sources.relevance: Defines reimbursement methodology and billing requirements for dialysis services

primary_sources.name: Medicare Claims Processing Manual Chapter 8 - Outpatient ESRD
primary_sources.relevance: Provides detailed billing and claims submission requirements for nephrology services

primary_sources.name: Healthcare Financial Management Association Revenue Cycle Best Practices
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes industry standards for revenue cycle optimization and denial management

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases Revenue Cycle Studies
secondary_sources.relevance: Publishes research on financial aspects of nephrology practice management

secondary_sources.name: Kidney Care Quality Alliance Payment Reform Resources
secondary_sources.relevance: Provides guidance on value-based care and alternative payment models in nephrology

gaps: Limited specialty-specific revenue cycle management guidelines for nephrology practices
Lack of standardized metrics for nephrology revenue cycle performance benchmarking
